# videoColorSpaceDolbyVision

**Type Property**

Dolby Vision video.

## Declaration

```swift
static var videoColorSpaceDolbyVision: TVTopShelfCarouselItem.MediaOptions { get }
```

## Discussion

Specify this constant, or the [doc://com.apple.tvservices/documentation/TVServices/TVTopShelfCarouselItem/MediaOptions-swift.struct/videoColorSpaceHDR] constant, but not both.

## Media Options

- **videoResolutionHD**: High-definition video resolution.
- **videoResolution4K**: Ultra-high-definition 4K video resolution.
- **videoColorSpaceHDR**: High-dynamic-range video.
- **audioDolbyAtmos**: Audio content with Dolby Atmos.
- **audioTranscriptionClosedCaptioning**: Audio content with closed captioning.
- **audioTranscriptionSDH**: Audio content with subtitles for people who are deaf or hard of hearing.
- **audioDescription**: Audio content with audio descriptions.

items.description: Audio content with subtitles for people who are deaf or hard of hearing.
